zh.lifeSummary: 當Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande於1045年出生在荷蘭霍蘭丹 哈格時，她的父親Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland29歲，母親Gertrud Billung von Sachsen11歲。她和Baudouin de Guînes至少有5個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1085年享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande于1045年出生在荷兰霍蘭丹 哈格时，她的父亲Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland29岁，母亲Gertrud Billung von Sachsen11岁。她和Baudouin de Guînes至少有5个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1085年享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hollande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Sosa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande was born in 1045, in The Hague, Holland, Netherlands, her father, Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland, was 29 and her mother, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, was 11. She had at least 5 sons and 6 daughters with Baudouin de Guînes. She died in 1085, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande est née en 1045, à La Haye, Holland, Pays-Bas, son père, Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, avait 11 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles avec Baudouin de Guînes. Elle est décédée en 1085, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande 1045 in Den Haag, Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland 29 und ihre Mutter Gertrud Billung von Sachsen 11. Sie hatte mit Baudouin de Guînes mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1085 im Alter von 40 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande è nata il nel 1045 nel Den Haag, Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, aveva 11 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie con Baudouin de Guînes. Morì nel 1085, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollandeが1045年にオランダホーランドデン ハアグで生まれた時，父Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Frieslandは29歳，母Gertrud Billung von Sachsenは11歳であった。彼女はBaudouin de Guînesとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1085年に40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande(이)가 1045년 네덜란드 홀랜드 든 하아그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrud Billung von Sachsen(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 Baudouin de Guînes(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1085년 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande nasceu em 1045, em Den Haag, Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, tinha 11 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas com Baudouin de Guînes. Ela faleceu em 1085, com 40 anos.

ro.La Haye, Holland, Pays-Bas: Den Haag, Holland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande родилась в 1045 г. в местности ден хааг, холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, 11. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Baudouin de Guînes. Она умерла в 1085 г. в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande nació en 1045, en Den Haag, Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, tenía 11 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas con Baudouin de Guînes. Murió en 1085, a la edad de 40 años.
